overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway during a heavy winter snowstorm. The game engine footage shows the truck navigating through light traffic, passing under concrete overpasses, and driving through open countryside with active windshield wipers clearing the snow from the windshield.

white car overtakes in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along a snow-covered highway with active windshield wipers clearing the heavy snowfall. Snow-covered guardrails line both sides of the road while the vehicle approaches and passes under the first concrete overpass. A white sedan overtakes on the left lane as the truck maintains steady speed through the winter storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with dense tree lines

highway curves gently to the right

agents.ego_description: navigating a right-hand curve on the highway while maintaining consistent speed

entered.detail: highway direction sign partially obscured by snow

segments.scene_description: The highway curves gently to the right through a section densely lined with snow-covered trees on both sides. A large white semi-truck overtakes the ego vehicle on the left lane. A road sign becomes visible on the right side as the truck navigates the curved stretch of winter highway.

navigating through moderate traffic with multiple vehicles in adjacent lanes

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along a straight section of highway with moderate traffic visible in adjacent lanes. Power lines run parallel to the road on the left side. The vehicle approaches and passes under a second concrete overpass, with open snow fields becoming visible on the right side of the road.

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed through open countryside while overtaking slower traffic

expansive flat agricultural field completely covered in white snow

segments.scene_description: The highway stretches through open snow-covered countryside with expansive white fields visible on both sides of the road. The truck overtakes a slower vehicle on the left lane while maintaining steady speed. Snow-covered guardrails continue along both sides as the heavy snowfall persists through the rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a heavy snowstorm, moving from an urban highway corridor into an expansive rural landscape. It begins with the windshield wipers clearing thick snowfall while the vehicle passes under a concrete overpass and is overtaken by a white sedan. As the highway curves gently to the right, the environment shifts into a dense corridor of snow-covered trees where a large white semi-truck passes on the left. The scene then opens up as the truck travels past power lines and a second overpass, with the roadside transitioning from enclosed structures to open snow fields. Finally, the camera glides through a wide, white countryside where the truck overtakes a slower vehicle amidst endless frozen plains and persistent snowfall.
